name: Macaroni and Cheese with Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as directed on package; drain and rinse.
2. Stir celery and olives into macaroni.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place half of the macaroni mixture in an ungreased baking dish, measuring 13.5x8.25x1.75 inches.
5. Mix tuna, onion, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, and cheese in a separate bowl.
6. Sprinkle half of the cheese mixture over the macaroni; repeat.
7. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a 2-quart saucepan over low heat.
8. Stir in flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper until smooth and bubbly.
9. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream and wine.
10. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
11. Pour the hot mixture over the tuna mixture; dot with 1 tablespoon butter.
12. Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
13. Uncover and bake until golden, about 15 minutes.
